svg.title: socialIO — real-time message lifecycle flow
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow from user sends a message to all recipients receiving it with delivery and seen status

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the client do before sending a message?')
g.text: Zustand optimistic update · bubble shows immediately

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Hono gateway validate the message?')
g.text: Better Auth session · participant membership guard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the sequence number transaction work?')
g.text: SELECT MAX(seq)+1 FOR UPDATE · safe under group concurrency

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AES-256 message encryption work?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis pub/sub fan-out work?')
g.text: channel: conversation:{id} · payload: decrypted message JSON

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the WebSocket server push to each client?')
sendPrompt('How does the WebSocket server push to recipients?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the recipient receives the message?')
g.text: appends to message list · emits message_delivered

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the delivered status written to the database?')
g.text: INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE · sender sees double grey tick

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the seen status work?')
sendPrompt('How does the seen receipt reach the original sender?')
